4050977276.name: ESCAPE MR. STINKY DETENTION! (OBBY)
4050977276.desc: You've just been given detention for throwing paper airplanes during class. There's only one problem, today's detention is under the watch of the world's MOST EVIL teacher, Mr. Stinky. No student has EVER escaped Mr. Stinky, can we be the first? LET'S ESCAPE!

5122637369.name: Escape The Bakery Obby (NEW)
5122637369.desc:
🍔 Oh no, the evil baker has taken control over the bakery! He's starting to go crazy and he is turning people into donuts!

⚙️ Will you be able to beat the obstacles and reach safety? ⚙️

⭐ If you've enjoyed this game and want more similar games, please show your support by liking and favoriting!

4365819446.name: Keys 🗝️
4365819446.desc:
Welcome to KEYS, an exhilarating adventure game where you must face your fears and evade the monsters lurking in the darkness. Explore mysterious places, find keys to unlock doors, and discover the secrets hidden in the shadows.

But be cautious - this journey is not for the faint-hearted:

8504461817.desc:
🔥 Escape The Lava 🔥
